title: Tokens
description: Design tokens resolved from Figma variables. Map of figmaVarPath -> {cssVar, value, type}.

map.description: Keys = Figma variable path (e.g. 'surface/surface-brand'). Values = token definition.

value.description: Resolved value (hex, px, rem, number). Raw — consumed by token file generators.

modes.description: Per-mode values (e.g. light/dark). Keys = mode name.
